factionAbilities.name: TEMPORAL COMMAND
factionAbilities.effect: During the action phase, you may remove 1 command token from your fleet pool to place 1 command token from your reinforcements in any system that contains 1 or more of your units.

factionAbilities.name: FUTURE SPACE
factionAbilities.effect: During the status phase, you may place 1 command token from your reinforcements in a system that contains 1 or more of your units.

versions.effect: Place this card face up in your play area. When you activate a system that contains 1 or more of the Nomad player's units, you may place 1 command token from your reinforcements in that system. Then, return this card to the Nomad player.

factionTechnologies.name: Temporal Flux
factionTechnologies.effect: After you activate a system, you may place 1 command token from your reinforcements in that system.

factionTechnologies.name: Supercharge Thrusters
factionTechnologies.effect: During movement, you may apply +1 to the move value of each of your ships that begins its movement in a system that contains 1 or more of your command tokens.

abilities.name: Temporal Jump
abilities.effect: After you activate this system, you may remove 1 command token from your fleet pool to place 1 command token from your reinforcements in this system.

mech.name: Chrono Legionnaire
mech.deploy: After you activate a system, you may place this unit in that system.

synergy.description: Tus tecnologías amarillas pueden usarse como verdes para prerrequisitos, y viceversa.

ability.name: Temporal Shift
ability.effect: ACTION: Exhaust this card to place 1 command token from your reinforcements in any system that contains 1 or more of your units.
